headlines.headline: Thunder remain NBA title betting favorites; Spurs, Celtics follow
headlines.description: The Thunder (+110) remain large betting favorites to repeat as NBA champions, but the betting public also likes the Spurs (+500) and Celtics (+550) to give Oklahoma City a run for their money.

headlines.headline: Who won the Jaguars-Browns draft-day trade for Travis Hunter?
